title: The Straw Hat Grand Fleet Is Born
description: Luffy rejects command but accepts friendship, and the fleet forms itself around his freedom.
scene: On pages 2–6, Luffy, Bartolomeo, Sai, Colosseum Fighters, Straw Hat Pirates gather after Dressrosa and the future Straw Hat Grand Fleet begins to take shape.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: There's no way I'm drinkin' this!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: How will Luffy Respond to His Underlings' Request!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't really like the taste of alcohol, and, well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's not about the taste here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You guys! Because of this incident, you're all gonna end up on the hotshots' hit lists! They'll be after your heads!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And because you saved all of us, we...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: But, if I drink this, doesn't that mean...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: I'll become the captain commander...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: of this grand fleet?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: You betcha! With 5600 underlings at your Beck and call, you'll finally be able to openly become a bigshot pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy-senpai, you're the man that will one day become the pirate king!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're gonna need at least this many people if you wanna take over the world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: leave it be. He just doesn't take to this kind of stuff.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Pour this stuff back in the barrel. I'll take my time guzzling it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oi! We're not tryna kick back and have a few beers here!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Why, Straw Hat!? What part of this formidable power displeases you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Even the strongest cannot best the strength to be found in numbers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: There will certainly come a day when even you will need us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Too uptight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Anyway, my nose tells me you guys are preparing a banquet back there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Crap, his attention's switched to the food!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Now is not the time for this Tomfoolery, Straw Hat! I, your Senpai, the star himself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Is doing you the amazing favor of joining under you!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: get the food. We'll make him drink it while he's eating.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You bastard, are you implying that we're too weak!? And to think I thought of you as our Savior!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: That's a fine way to talk to the person you want to be your captain, you morons!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Like I said! I'm gonna be the pirate King!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I've got no interest in being some poofty big- shot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Oi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Did he really just say that...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: This sake... not half-bad...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Don't just stick your hand in it! That's why they invented cups! Can you at least pretend to have some manners, man!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Ufufu...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Not half-bad, you say...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: If we happen to get into a pinch,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: We'll just yell for you guys!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: And if that ever happens, come help us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: There's no need for all this parent-child boss- underling stuff, right?! I don't need to be some crazy bigshot pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: If you guys are ever in trouble, just yell for me! You have my word, I'll be there before ya' know it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I'll never forget that we all fought Mingo together!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: I think I'm starting to get what he's trying to say...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy- Senpai's idea of a pirate king...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Isn't some super important bigshot,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: But someone that's... free...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: What's going on!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Cannon- Fire!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Is it the Marines!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: No way! I'm sure we stitched all the Navy ships together before coming here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Let's let Columbus handle this one! We're still in the middle of our meeting here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: doesn't matter who they are, drive 'em off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Ah!!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Is that 500 million Berry Straw Hat among you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: If so, bring him forward! We'll be taking his head!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: We were all in the middle of a crucial negotiation with DoFlamingo! Until your meddling self had to go and ruin it!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: We are a fleet alliance made up of those who bear a grudge, Straw Hat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: If the King of this Island's changed, we're also going to have this new King Riku see to it that our deal is completed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Fire! Fire!

summary: This part shows the Dressrosa allies trying to define their bond with Luffy, while Luffy resists formal command and keeps his freedom at the center.
